subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-11 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: It is good that we met you in the street without some sort of intermediary; it is good to make one's acquaintance this way
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوبست ما بشما در کوچه آشنا شدیم بدون واسطه این نحو آشنائی خوبست الحمدلله در بداپست
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
